acquisition method: the Thermo ScientificTM Q ExactiveTM mass spectrometer in Data Dependent Acquisition mode.
alkylation reagent: followed by alkylation with 55 mM IAA for 45 min.
alkylation concentration: followed by alkylation with 55 mM IAA for 45 min.
cleavage agent: the enzyme was specified as trypsin.
enrichment method: we performed immunoprecipitation and mass spectrometry.
instrument: the Thermo ScientificTM Q ExactiveTM mass spectrometer.
labeling: LFQ of label-free quantification was selected.
reduction reagent: by incubation with 10 mM DTT at 56°C for 1 h.
reduction concentration: by incubation with 10 mM DTT at 56°C for 1 h.
